reviews.text:

To make matters worse, my case gets assigned to a new caseworker almost every week, and none of them seem to know anything about my situation. This has caused significant delays in my ability to receive necessary medical care. I am extremely disappointed with the lack of communication, consistency, and professionalism.

reviews.ownerResponse: We sincerely apologize for the challenges you've faced. It's concerning to hear about the communication issues and lack of consistency with our team. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we hope to make amends.

Go figure. We are about to lose everything. No answers or help. And apparently he can't get in touch with William green to answer why we have not received his check when they work in the same damn building. My husband has been so patient with this whole process. But I feel so bad for him because he's worked hard his whole life and to be treated like this is ridiculous. Oh, and apparently they don't have all the information on his injuries which we have given them multiple times. And they are trying to get him to settle on 1 injury instead of all of them. Best Attorney Ever !!! I highly recommend Mr. Arthur J La Cilento As a family Attorney!!!

reviews.authorName: Ariana's life with a reborn Breuker

reviews.text: Arthur Lacilento is an absolute legal beast! This lawyer is a powerhouse in the courtroom. His attention to detail and understanding of legal intricacies make Mr. Lacilento a force to be reckoned with. If you're seeking a lawyer who doesn’t just win cases and fights for you, then he’s your man – he will crush the opposition. This lawyer is simply in a league of his own.

Art and his wife Sue are angels from God above. I finally found Art after I went through about 9 Orange County lawyers, who were all either crooks (promised the moon but did and delivered NOTHING yet managed to rack up huge bills) or incompetent. Art and Sue were the only ones who cared, fought for me tooth and nail and helped my situation greatly. Thank you Art and Sue!
Very helpful and awesome people here.

Art has been my attorney for a few years now on several cases. I have seen his passion at trial and can tell you that he fights for you. He is hard because cases are rocks. He is tough because he is fighting giants. He is short because he needs time to invest into your case. But there is no question that this man will ever give up. Art is unquestionably trustworthy, and his fiduciary duty to his clients is exemplified in his conviction in court through the powerful words he uses to fight. Art possesses the God-given skills to be confident, skilled and knowledgeable. I would highly recommend this man to anyone.
He is really good and knows his stuff.

Art La Cilento is an amazing lawyer. He has a true PASSION for what he does. He treats you like family.He wants the very BEST for you and your kids.He is COMMITTED to you and a positive, WINNING outcome. He COMMUNICATES well in and out of court. He has never ignored me. He returns all calls. He answers all your questions. He calms all your worries. He LISTENS well with an open mind. He is very TALENTED. He knows the laws well. He is full of KNOWLEDGE. He truly.has the right PASSION, KNOWLEDGE, DEDICATION to you and as a result you will end up with a successful, WINNING outcome. His paralegal Susan is also FABULOUS. She too is INTELLIGENT, COMPASSIONATE, KNOWLEDGEABLE, and a master at law. She treats you like FAMILY too. Art's entire office is AWESOME. I HIGHLY recommend  ART LA CILENTO because he  is #1!

Yesterday was the day my cfs case was closed out of San Bernardino. The first 7 months all they did was give me the run around with getting my son back. The whole dynamic changed once I hired Arthur. Thank you for everything.

I cannot state in the space provided me by Google reviews the extent to which I would recommend hiring Mr La Cilento . If you find yourself in a situation where you need his services I fully understand that you’re in a place of crisis and fear and the only thing that got me or my family through our particular crisis is a complete faith in Art and his wife Susan who work together as a team to provide the utmost quality of service compassion effectiveness and most importantly honesty. put your pride aside put your fears aside put your ideas aside and trust and what you’re being told by these amazing people.  If you want somebody to hold your hand and tell you everything‘s going to be OK and then apologize later when things go wrong this is the wrong team to hire but if you want someone who tells you the truth who treats you with respect and who fights for you and for your kids with integrity and commitment then you would be blessed to have Mr LaCilento at your back.
If I could leave zero stars I would.  I feel like I wasted my money.

Arthur LaCilento is an honest advocate for your children. I have had on-going custody and support issues for over 5 years. My first attorney was not getting the job done so I retained Art. It was one of the best decision I have ever made in my life. Art and his office (his wife Susan is phenomenal) took the stress away and handled everything for me. He has been honest in everything from custody issues to support issues to the billing of his hours. I have watched him fight for my children and also educate me on the law. He has been very concerned about the needs of my children and about doing what is best for them. Sometimes we as parents have a hard time separating emotions from legal issues. I would get upset with the system and feel hopeless.  Art knows the law well and he would always explain things and get me mentally ready. He has taught me that patience and procedure are very important when children are involved. Because of this, I have had no surprises. He is relentless in his fight for my children and in doing what is best for them. He is kind and has a big heart, but can be a real fighter when it is necessary. His knowledge of the law gives him an edge when filing legal paperwork. I would not hesitate to retain him for any divorce or family law issues.

Art LaCliento knows the law. He is an advocate for children and in my experience will always do what is best for your child. I retained him to settle custody and support issues and was very happy with the outcome. His office is easy to work with and they are all very knowledgeable. His wife Susan is very detailed and organized and they made a great team while fighting on our behalf. I would not hesitate to hire him again for any family law issues.

It's been over a year since my son passed away in DCFS's custody and Art still has not bothered to get me, a copy of my son's entire case file, DCFS's file, my son's medical or mental health records, nothing. I keep telling him that I want my father-in-law to be my 16 year old daughter's legal guardian, just to be done with court, but he keeps pushing for reunification prolonging this case further. I've told him, these social workers are not giving us referrals for free classes, they remove our names from the list on days we have to test. They're NOT going to help us get our teenager back because of what happened to our son. I have evidence of the social workers trying to cover up their mistakes by altering documents and falsifying reports. Art doesn't want to hear anything about this because Art used to be one of them as county council, fighting to keep children away from their parents and now he's "representing parents" Art was loud and aggressive in court but also when he spoke to me. I was just released from the hospital with a diagnosis of major depression disorder, recurrent, severe with psychotic symptoms after losing my first born son and then Art wants to intimidate me by threatening to stop representing me if I didn't settle and then lied that it wouldn't effect my lawsuit.
After reading my review on Yelp, Art filed a motion to withdraw as my attorney. Him and Vincent Davis are one in the same. Make sure you check out "A Profit Manual For Attorneys by Vincent Davis, it'll make you think twice before hiring them.
Visit Justice for Damian on Facebook to find out the truth of my family, visit Damian's Advocates. Fight for Justice, fight for Damian.

I would most certainly recommend Art LaCilento he is a very good attorney along with a great staff. They’ll work tirelessly on your case which will result in the BEST outcome for you. He has definitely been more than a blessing to me during this whole ordeal and took a lot of stress out of a very poor situation. He is smart, effective and a ‘bulldog’ when he needs to be. You want him on your side. Art’s legal representation is worth every dollar. Thank you for everything Mr. LaCilento, I greatly appreciate it.

I was scrolling through the internet and saw Arthur's name. About 8 years ago I hired Art for my adult daughter's CPS case, yes he is an Amazing man he's more than amazing. He's Definitely not afraid of the government. Those dirty little lies to rip families apart. ...

Looking for an attorney is overwhelming, finding one that can actually fight for you using the law is even harder. I was desperate looking for someone who could help me and had a lot of options. From the moment I spoke to Mr. LaCilento, I knew he made me feel protected. In juvenile court, he appeared to know more laws and codes than the judge as I saw her look a few up after he cited them. He dominates in a multi-entity courtroom. He was able to get my case dismissed because I followed his instructions. Do NOT argue with this man, you will not win. He is really in this field to help and has so much knowledge to navigate within the law. I was so pleased with his dedication and response time that I hired him for family law after my juvenile case was DISMISSED in what seemed to be impossible or a huge rarity considering the position I was in! I will forever have respect for this attorney and would recommend him to anyone I love or like, but never an enemy. I would not want to go up against his ferocious litigant. I am still in family court and he is doing a superior job. I have had a few attorneys and can attest that he calls back, he gets the job done and works hard, he does not send other attorneys in for him. I’m not sure I would be able to find anyone better. Thank you Mr. LaCilento, you rock and so does your staff. ***this has also been posted on Yelp***
Couldn’t ask for a better attorney

Art and Sue (his wife) are a dynamic duo!!! His office team are amazing and they make you feel like they really do care about you and what you are going through, I really appreciated that. Art fought aggressively for me as if it were his own case. I highly recommend him and his team to take care of your case!

If you're looking for an attorney that will fight for you... That's not scared to draw blood in a courtroom... Then Arthur J locilento is the attorney for you... I hired him and he's still to this day fighting for me he is not giving up... And if he's fighting for me and won't give up then he'll fight for you...

I was in a bad situation, and was referred to this law office for representation.

I was represented by Arthur LaCilento himself, and quickly found that he was the best possible attorney for me. He quickly sized me up and offered quick advice on how to minimize my weaknesses. He also quickly came up with a plan and executed on it, giving me my best possible outcome.

His approach wasn't so much "rah rah comfort everything will work out" as it was "Here is your situation, and here is what we are going to do." It was an attitude I greatly appreciated, and I have a feeling he changes his approach based on his client.

His rates were also a bit lower than other firms', without compromising on quality.

If you ever find yourself in an unthinkable situation, I highly recommend giving Arthur's office a call.

Art is a wonderful man! If you feel hopeless and feel like everything is horrible and falling to pieces? Feel like your not being represented properly? have him represent you! He got me my kids back. And I cannot thank him enough he truly is a godsend. I'm truly blessed to have had him in my time of need. Thank you!

Mr. Lacilento saved me and my family from being taken apart by the same government that I fought hard for in Iraq and Afghanistan. Somethings wrong with the justice system, something sneaky is going on that's allowing the government to have so much power over our parental rights. Trust in God and don't stop praying.
The Best Ever! Helping my family since 1985. Thank You Mr. Beckman
Very good lawyer

Unprofessional consultation over the phone, instead of allowing myself as he suggested I do he kept cutting me off, made assumptions without listening and stated all I wanted to do is argue. Was looking for a family law attorney and a civil rights attorney I did my research before hand all I got was information I already knew.
Definitely need more training in customer service I wouldn’t refer to anyone I know.

DO NOT hire this man to represent you in any capacity. I hired him for a child custody case in June of ‘23 and he completely screwed me and my children over. He never wanted to get a game plan going or go over anything. He had told me repeatedly that I would be victorious in my legal battle with the amount of documentation and evidence I had, only to roll over at the last minute DURING COURT when opposing counsel met with him in private for over 3 hours while I waited outside the conference room. He told me it was in my best interest to settle out of court and that I wouldn’t like the outcome in with the judge. Completely the opposite of what he had told me for months after seeing my evidence when I first hired him. He also agreed to a custody schedule with opposing counsel that I did not agree to, then tried to tell me “It’s ok, we can change it later”. (No i can’t!) He told me he would charge me $200 an hour then sent me a bill and said he never said that and charged me $400+. He charged me for things twice and even had the same court appearance on the bill twice with 2 different amounts and different hours charged. He is a complete crook. After hiring him he made sexual comments to me and tried to engage in text conversation at night with me, having nothing to do with court. He talked about women wanting to sleep with him and husbands accusing him of sleeping with their wives. Most of which I don’t even believe. He was a complete creep and took advantage of me being a single mom. I would have fired him but I had no money to hire someone else as it was all tied up in my retainer with him. I was finally able to get money for a new attorney to try to help me clean up the mess this man made of mine and my children’s lives. My children are now in an unsafe situation because this man is completely incompetent and too lazy to go to trial. There is not an honest bone in that man’s body. DO NOT HIRE HIM.
He knows his stuff and will fight for your parental rights
This man is a dishonest crook. In 1989 he tricked me into pleading quilty to a life sentence.  He has no heart or a conscience.
Best lawyer ever

James Cesena is an amazing attorney. I have known him for over 30 years and he has helped me several times. He is always available and compassionate towards people and their problems for which he is very qualified. I don't know what I would do without him.  Thank you Jim.

Working with Mr. Andrew Delahunt has been nothing short of exceptional. He not only negotiated the best possible outcome for my son, but also went above and beyond to keep our family informed every step of the way. His compassion, professionalism, and relentless advocacy truly set him apart.

Throughout the process, Mr. Delahunt demonstrated a deep understanding of the law while maintaining a personal and empathetic approach to our situation. During the court hearing, his ability to stand firm against the District Attorney was remarkable. While the DA appeared frustrated, Mr. Delahunt remained calm and assertive—offering reasonable alternatives and advocating strongly for what he believed was fair for his client. At one point, he confidently stated, "This is what my client is requesting, and I believe it’s fair." The judge agreed and ultimately adopted Mr. Delahunt’s proposal, leading to the shortest and least burdensome outcome possible. Even the DA could only nod in reluctant agreement.

We are incredibly grateful for Mr. Delahunt’s dedication, integrity, and results. If you're looking for someone who will fight for you with skill, heart, and conviction—Mr. Andrew Delahunt is that attorney. Highly recommended.

Fortunate, to have had Andrew Delahunt, Esq. represent me throughout the entirety of my case. From the start, Mr.Delahunt already had a thorough knowledge of what the process for my case would be, from beginning to end. Even still, he consistently provided extensive, detailed, communication and support throughout the entire ordeal. He really does have his clients’ best interests in mind. Overall, well pleased with his service as well as the outcome of the case. Irrefutably, a true expert and real professional. Strongly recommended.

The lawyer Andrew is the best lawyer in Orange County and California, he is an excellent person, with a lot of knowledge, an excellent lawyer helps all the people he represents, he has a personalized service, very good communication, he is very attentive to all the processes, I always highly recommend it.

It’s taking me a while but I really have to put my story out there so people don’t get scam  with this Lawyer, This is just my experience with this lawyer name Andrew, I gave them money to fight for my Dui case and he had me plead with no content  I still needed to take All these classes after paying him to GET ME a Better plead deal he DIDN'T get me a better plead I could’ve done this myself and saved all the money I gave this lawyer. He does not care about your case or your rights he just cares about the money and also not once did he ever contact me about giving me any updates about my case  and also the day of court he showed up 40 minutes late.

This lawyer Andrew is a thief ! Be careful people , I gave him 1500$ to bring me my court documents records and other arrests, but he didn’t he told me that he can’t do this after he took the money! And my friend helped me bring the records when this guy Andrew said there was no records…

I had a fantastic experience working with Uplift Law. They were always responsive to my questions and concerns, and I felt supported throughout the entirety of opening up my small business. Words do not describe how amazing the team at Uplift Law is. As a client, I was blown away by the level of communication, professionalism, and service that Mel and her team provide. I could not recommend them enough. Thank you for all your help and for continuing to provide excellent service.

Let's face it, if you need an attorney its usually because something is going wrong. Its stressful & all consuming. That was me this week. It was calming to know someone looked at my stress with an "I got you" attitude & took my problems, made them their own and resolved them while reassuring me I was correct in my process.  Thank you Uplift for living up to my high expectations.

Uplift Law is a committed, agile, and dedicated team. They are very responsive and thorough. They have helped us with numerous legal issues that have had significant positive impacts on our business. They understand our business and have helped us with business strategy, liability and risk reduction, and employment matters as we have scaled from 1 - 3 gym locations. They are exactly the team you want in your corner!

When Mel says she’s the mother of small business. She’s definitely not kidding.

Mel and her team at uplift law are organized, punctual and well versed in all things business.

No matter what’s going on they will always make time to answer questions, give you updates, and guide you through whatever situation or process you may need.

While Mel was  going through a multimillion dollar case she took the  time to personally update me on mine.

She’s smart, strong, genuine and most importantly she cares.

Having Uplift law on my team is a peace of mind worth having.
I want to say thank you to Melissa and firm and team for all her help , took a minute but my case was resolved . I’m very happy with outcome and would recommend her to everyone. Thank you again

Thank you Uplift Law for your excellent work representing our small business! The Uplift Law team is very knowledgeable and professional and most importanly they work with integrity and take pride in their work.  They gave us a free consultation and took the time to explain things to us clearly all the way through.  They responded quickly to any emails or phone calls and we felt our business was top priority for them. Uplift Law was tough and stood up for us!. We enjoyed working with you and your team and we felt safe with you at our side. We will contact you again when we need legal services.

Mel and her team are such a gift to our non-profit, and we highly recommend Uplift Law! As we grow into a larger organization, Mel has been there every step of the way to guide us in our hiring and employment needs such as creating our employee handbook, contracts, networking on insurance needs, and so much more.

We were so touched to arrive at Uplift’s holiday party, as a new pro bono client to the firm, to see a beautiful wreath they made for us with our name on it, up on the wall with all of their other clients. We have felt like the red carpet has been rolled out for us since the beginning and so appreciate all of their generous service to our cause. We couldn’t do it without them!!

We look forward to working with them this year and beyond, as we continue to serve teens in Orange County.

Uplift Law feels like family to us and we believe you will feel the same! :)

The team was able to navigate our very technical complaint after we experienced a failed ERP rollout to no fault of our own. Since the software company handling integration was so large we looked for weeks to find someone to help us from Florida in the company’s home state of California.  Uplift was there every step of the way.  We couldn’t be more pleased by their performance and ultimately the result of managing our case.  Highly recommended firm.

I contacted Melissa after reading all the reviews and I glad I did. They responded the next day , keep in mind I wrote them an email late one evening and was surprised.  When I explained how a felt she took the time to understand and she explained that she would guide me thru the whole process. Her team is very professional and on point to your needs. If you want someone to be on your side and fight for your rights. I advise you not go anywhere as but UPLIFT LAW.   Melissa and team thank you for your professionalism and helping me thru the whole process.

We are very pleased with the service we received from Uplift! The one on one attention we got was incredible. We could not have asked for a better outcome to our case. Our heartfelt thanks to their entire team!

It's rare that I write reviews, but I feel this needs to be talked about. Melissa did such an incredible job on my case. Not only was she attentive and available at all times I needed but also made things easy to understand in the legal system. We not only got the outcome we'd hoped for but also in a very timely manner. I can't say enough about how positive my experience was with Uplift Law. Mel has been counseling me with my business since 2019. She has helped me with complex requests in a timely manner, for employment, contractual, and client-facing matters. She is also open to meeting in-person or virtually, which is great in this new working environment. Highly recommended for new business owners!

I am so grateful to Melissa at Uplift Law for her exceptional work. I needed assistance with some delicate legal matters and she was the utmost professional during all of our interactions. She was extremely prompt with all her responses and her team worked quickly to resolve my issues within days of contacting them. Melissa and her team worked hard to fight on my behalf and provided me with knowledge regarding the law that I was unaware of. This level of service was above and beyond my expectations and I will be going to Uplift Law for any future legal needs and I will definitely recommend her to others. Melissa has your best interest at heart and she will go to bat for you. Not only if she smart, but very well spoken and she knows how to deliver. Thank you for providing me with the peace of mind knowing that I am represented by Uplift Law.

I recently developed an idea for a product but I had no knowledge of how to bring it to market.  Uplift Law has been there every step of the way and does the highest quality work.  I feel protected and empowered going into a highly saturated and cut throat market because of them and I would never have even considered my idea more than a pipe dream before contacting Melissa.  If you have a small business or need anything business related attended to, I highly recommend this firm.

Melissa of Uplift Law is by far the best attorney I’ve worked with thus far! She successfully  helped me negotiate and obtain a commercial lease agreement for my business in my favor. She responds quickly and is very attentive to detail! She definitely cares about her client’s best interests. 11/10; I would definitely recommend to everyone looking for an attorney. Thank you Mel for helping my business. Will definitely be using your services again for all future endeavors.

Melissa Fulgencio and UPLIFT LAW is what you call the definition of “ THE GREATEST “. Since the first day she took on my case, I knew I was in great hands. Not once did I felt alone going after the company that did me wrong. She went head on with the company and we WON. She was very clear on what she want. If you are in need of a great Lawyer, please pick her. Thank you very much for making this a smooth and easy ride.

We contacted Melissa after we heard about how she won a case where a life insurance would not pay out to the beneficiary. My father died of pancreatic cancer. You cannot imagine the pain, suffering, and mental anguish our family experienced. On top of that pain, one of his life insurances would not pay out. Melissa was kind, patient, and strong. We told her that we went several months back and forth by ourselves with the life insurance company, but there was no luck for a pay out. Even when we pointed out to the life insurance representatives their inconsistencies and false misrepresentation, they still would not admit they did anything wrong. The life insurance company preyed on my ailing father who was living and treating a terminal illness. Melissa fought for us, and would continuously communicate any information. She answered all our questions with care and attentiveness. Melissa was incredibly supportive, and listened to our story. Our family is so grateful to Uplift Law for their help.

Melissa and her team will do absolutely everything in her power to get you and your case to a place that you will be happy with! She is communicative, hard working and tenacious about her clients- exactly who you want in your corner for any legal situation. She leads by example and her strength is totally contagious! Melissa and the entire Uplift Law team are exactly who you want in the ring with you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Ashley for your kind words! We are very happy that we were able to help you with your case to your satisfaction!

Hello Spencer,

He took the time to explain everything clearly, always made sure I felt informed, and treated me with genuine care and respect. It was clear from the beginning that he is not only an excellent attorney, but also a truly good person with a good heart.

Because we spoke so frequently during my case, I came to trust him deeply. After my case was settled and I was paid, Michael told me I could reach out to him anytime if I ever had legal questions—even if they were unrelated to an injury case. Not long after, I found myself needing legal guidance for an entirely different matter. Without hesitation, he stepped in and resolved the issue in less than 24 hours, and he did so completely free of charge.

Even after helping me a second time, he again encouraged me to call if I ever needed legal help or had questions in the future. That level of integrity, generosity, and genuine care is rare. I am incredibly grateful to Michael Menicucci and truly feel indebted to him for always going above and beyond. If you are looking for an attorney who is not only highly skilled but also deeply compassionate and trustworthy, Michael is the one to call.

They won my case today . They were recommended to me by a friend and even dough I was a bit nervous going through this route , I’m glad I did . Very professional and nice from A to Z with the communication. Just got an email we won the case !!! Yay !!!!
Mark Gallagher Esq is an exceptional Attorney. I highly recommend him.

Mark is absolutely awesome at what he does, from the beginning he was very accessible and took the time to hear all my concerns, had a game plan from the beginning , and it turned out exactly the way he said it would, especially being a commercial driver this case meant everything to me, ticket dismissed and now I can get on with my life thanks to Mark and his staff
Hi: Mark and Juan both worked in handling my case; and were extremely thorough throughout it.  I highly recommend them!
best lawyer i ever had

Mark Gallagher is not only an excellent criminal defense lawyer, he is also a great guy. I chose Mark after talking with about 10 different lawyers. Everyone's situation is different, having a strong case is important if your going to fight like we did. We took a DUI to the edge of trial, hired an expert witness and fought hard for nearly 2 years, the major charges were dismissed and I was spared from some serious charges. We were fully prepared to take it all the way, and I knew Mark would have my back. He never over promised, took the time to give me the best advice and exceeded my expectations. Highly recommended.

The team at Gallagher was great, I'm so glad my friend Thomas recommended him to me. I was so happy today when I got the call that my speeding ticket was dismissed completely, far exceeding my expectation. He was also kind enough to recommend another lawyer in Las Vegas for another matter. Thank you all!
They did a great job fighting an uphill battle for my ticket. Ticket was dismissed.

Mark and his team were amazing they will always keep you updated and was very patient with me knowing this was my first ticket I had no clue what to do but they made sure i was good, plus they got my ticket dismissed giving me another chance. God bless everyone in this law firm and Mark, I appreciate you guys and I highly recommend them I alone will be recommending them to all my family and friends cheers and thanks again.
Best lawyer I ever had. Did everything he can to get My ticket dismiss. If you need ticket lawyer he is your guy. He will fight for you 100%.

Attorney Mark Gallagher and his team were exceptionally professional and courteous in handling my citation. They were always accessible and took the time to clearly explain the entire process. I highly recommend their services!

Don’t hire him he is the worst of lawyers! Unless u just want to throw ur money away! Horrible experience! He doesn’t give a crap about the people he is supposed to defend. I can also send u his text and emails to show his behavior.
The Law Offices of Mark A. Gallagher did an absolutely exceptional job of getting my citation dismissed. I would highly encourage anyone looking for a traffic defense to give them a call.
Mark A.Gallagher and his team  definitely know what’s they’re doing. Will take care of the issue and find solution. Traffic violation dismissed. Thank you!
reviews.ownerResponse: Happy we were able to help!

reviews.text:
Amazing experience! Reached out for help and got response within minutes!
If you looking for a lawyer on Southern California, I highly recommend Mark A. Gallagher!

The law firm exceeded my expectations in every aspect. From their professionalism to their swift action resulting in the dismissal of my ticket, I couldn't be more satisfied. Their expertise made the process smooth and stress-free. Grateful for their excellent service!

Mark's ability to go above and beyond in providing legal assistance was not just impressive, but also immensely reassuring. I highly recommend his services to anyone in need of legal support. Mark handled two traffic tickets for me while I was away in Australia. I had peace of mind knowing that he will do all he can to take care of my tickets for me. He had one ticket dismissed and the other one minimized greatly.
They helped me every step of the way. With their smart and patient advice my case was dismissed and I felt supported through a stressful process. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.text: Speeding ticket. Contacted Mark and explained the scenario. He listened and said do not worry we will take care of it. Ticket was dismissed. Will use again if needed.

Traffic ticket dismissed and I didn’t have to show up to court!

Mark Gallagher represented me for a Commercial driving Traffic ticket of impeding traffic. He got the ticket dismissed with no points or fines. This was the best outcome possible. I highly recommend Mark Gallagher for Traffic Tickets in Southern California. Thank You and take care

reviews.text:
Mark Gallagher represented me for a traffic violation ticket I received while visiting from out of state.

Juan kept me up to date the entire time, and Mark got my case completely dismissed!
No fines and no conviction shown on my driving record.

Could not be more pleased with the process, and would definitely contact them again if I'm ever in need.

My experience went well and hopefully it will for you too. We discussed the price, paid up front, maintained communication as the case ran its course and then were notified of a positive disposition. I would hire him again if the need presents itself.

Very happy with the services provided and the result (ticket dismissed). Mark Gallagher himself was very knowledgeable, calmed me down when I was very worried, and his office didn’t mind when I called them multiple times for updates. I have had negative experiences with legal representation from other offices, but was totally satisfied here and would definitely recommend anyone with traffic or criminal issues to contact Mark.
From the beginning to the end they were great, informative, polite, took my calls whenever I called without having to leave a message and get a call back. I highly recommend them when needed.
help me a lot, good lawyer  100 % recommended

Mark and his team are the best in the business.   Personable, accessible, and highly professional.   Having great council, you can trust, is vital to a successful outcome. I trust Marks wisdom and expertise implicitly.   Great Team!

Having had no prior experience with the legal system (meaning I'd never been in trouble before I received a DUI) I had no idea exactly how much trouble I was in when I got a ticket for driving without a license.  I had never taken my classes to have my license reinstated.  When I stood in front of the judge for my arraignment and he said mandatory 10 days in jail for driving on a suspended license my heart dropped into my stomach.  The law offices of Mark Gallagher was able to convince the court to allow me to take my DUI classes, attend my AA meetings and get my license reinstated within 6 months. And this was all without having to serve any time in jail.  I was very very lucky in that I didn't lose my job because I didn't have to serve any time in jail and all of the charges were dismissed thanks to the law offices of Mark Gallagher.  I basically owe them my life.
I really appreciate everything they did for me.

Mark is a class act and wonderful attorney.  He helped me thru some challenging legal circumstances while I sought help for other issues.

He is responsive and cares about doing the best for his clients. He really goes the extra mile and I highly recommend him.

I really appreciated the help & support of Mark & team with getting my ticket taken care of. Even with courts closed due to Covid, he stayed on top of it and kept me in the loop with any updates. I almost forgot when my court date was because I knew Mark had it all handled (& I didn't have to be there!). Hopefully I won't get tickets in the future, but if I do Mark is my go-to.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the wonderful review, Kate! We pride ourselves in providing the best possible service for our clients while maintaining it as hassle-free as possible for them. We, too, hope you don't have to use us again, but we're always here if you need us.

reviews.text: Mr. Gallagher took me on when I was supposed to be turning myself for my jail sentence for a dui. Not my first dui in my lifetime either. He not only got me and extension, he also convinced the judge to let me apply for house arrest so I could be at home and continue to work and support my family. This was all done in a matter of days and because of him, I was approved for house arrest and ensured I would serve my sentence at home while being able to go to and from work. I would definitely recommend Mr. Gallagher to anyone who asks and his professionalism as well as his calming demeanor really spoke volumes to me and eased my anxiety about a troubling and tense situation. Thank you Mr. Gallagher, you are truly appreciated!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the awesome review James.  It was a pleasure to help you resolve your legal issue.  Keeping clients home with their family is my favorite part of the job.   Hope you never need us again but if you do, you know where to find me.

reviews.text: I was referred to Mark by another attorney. Mark was super nice, professional, and his fee was reasonable. I like the fact that he texted and called me and was very responsive. Mark was able to get my speeding ticket down to a moving violation resulting in no traffic school, no points on my license, and he was also able to get a collections notice dismissed. I would hire Mark again in a heartbeat and would recommend him to anyone. Thank you again Mark! :)

reviews.text: In a world of corrupt Police Officers, Sheriff Deputies and over zealous District Attorneys who will basically lie to obtain any conviction. It is refreshing to have an Attorney, to not only navigate, but to also to take the helm in a case, no matter how meritless the charges may be. Sometimes, one has to actually pay the cost of being "not guilty" and these costs are not cheap, but necessary to prove ones innocence. Especially to a batch of Cops and DA's who WILL lie on the stand and WILL make you look worse than you actually are just to obtain a conviction. You are just a number to them. They will say it's nothing personal, but don;'t kid yourself, it's always personal when it comes down to ones life. .Justice is very slow and court cases can be drawn out for many months. If you go to Trail , it's even more time and money. I recently won my Trail with Mark. If you find yourself in a criminal legal situation that requires an Attorney to aid in your defense. I highly recommend Attorney Mark A. Gallagher. He is a professional, knowlegable and experienced Attorney, who cares about his Clients and will take the time to explain the entire legal process. People have a lot of choices and options in these types of situations. I made the right one by retaining Attorney Mark A. Gallagher.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the stellar review! We're so glad we were able to win your case and that your experience with us was so positive!

reviews.text: ONLY LAWYER I WILL EVER USE!!! Mark represented me for a dui case from 2014.  He got me off the hook but I totally screwed myself and didnt do anything the court asked of me. When I called him back 5 years later to reconcile the same case after turning my life around, He was worth 10 times  what i paid him.  Because of his tenacity for helping those who are really trying to turn themselves around, i was reduced from 150 days to a month on an ankle bracelet and transferred to my current county
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the kind words Austin. Its a pleasure helping clients like you get back on track and navigate the maze in court and at the DMV

Through the process, she not only helped me get my daughter's name changed but also helped me obtain another restraining order to protect us even longer. Thank you, Jennifer, for helping us on our healing journey.

Mr Gonzalez helped me and my family deal with a serious legal situation. He dedicated himself to our cause and helped us get out of that legal problem. He provided personal service unlike some other lawyers that we consulted with. Gracias Mr Gonzalez. Thank you.
They have excellent service, and did a verg good job on helping and defending me with my process in court.

Mr. Gonzalez is an exceptional lawyer. From start to finish, he demonstrated professionalism, integrity, and a deep understanding of the law. He was always clear in his communication, honest about expectations, and genuinely invested in helping me through a difficult legal process. I felt supported and well represented every step of the way. I highly recommend Mr. Gonzalez to anyone in need of legal representation I’ve even referred people I know to him because I truly believe in the quality of his work. He is a lawyer you can trust.

I highly recommend this Lawyer.
I trust in him and he has helped a good amount of friends, people and myself when I needed someone honest.

I was very pleased with attorney Gonzales, i walked in to his office a little concern about a personal legal matter, unfortunately he was not the right person to help me. But he shared his professional opinion, and gave me a better view of the situation. He was very helpful, and i will not think twice of recommending him if it is ever needed.

I am not sure what David is good at but child custody battles are not it I paid this man $2,000 to help me get some visitation and eventually some custody of my child David files paperwork like a pro but in court in front of judge he is not convincing of telling your side of the story, he does not make good arguments and the arguments he does makes are very weak.
This man was very insistent that I agree and settled to what the opposite party had proposed. And it seemed very obvious that he wanted to close my case as soon as possible with no hassle to him.
It helped me a lot in my case
Great service, a phenomenal service

I came in to consult with Mr. Gonzalez and retained him to handle one legal matter. He charged me $1k for a retainer. He made one phone call and wrote one letter. The other party never responded. I called Mr. Gonzalez for a financial follow up, his words, “We are half way thru the retainer.” He refused to send a statement. I have asked Mr. Gonzalez for a return of the unused portion of my retainer and he like most attorneys would do, doesn’t respond. I must now file a complaint and see if I will ever see my money again, which is not likely. Typical scumbag attorney.

I called The Gonzalez Law Firm for some clarifications regarding my child support the day before my mediation/hearing and they were able to provide me with great advice and direction. I highly recommend using their services for any Family Law questions. I received the clarity I needed to have some confidence at my child support meeting. Thank you!

David helped me out with a free consultation on what I needed to do in my current situation...he was straight to the point on what he recommended I should do and was very helpful with all the questions I needed to ask..so glad he was recommended to me! I will definently be going back to him in the future if I ever needed to!

I called the Gonzalez Law Firm to see if I could get assistance with a divorce modification - and he actually took my call. We spoke about my current circumstance, and I could tell just over the phone that he has a high level of integrity and candor - and uses both to assist in establishing an honest assessment of the circumstance. In my case, the conclusion was that I was on the borderline as to whether a modification would work in my favor - he suggested I hold off for a period, instead of rushing into court and possibly having the modification turn against me. I appreciated his input and told him I would buy him a drink - he suggested a write up on google instead - so here you go...take care David, and thanks again!
Help me out with family law case and explain everything very well.

David gonzales helme out with my divorse process but at the end he didnt do a good job he didnt provide information he filled out paperwork for childsupport modification and didnt do the right things to  reduce my montly childsupport he never answered his phone after that and the day of hearing day my montly childsupport went up $200.00    im tring to call him and he never respond

I am very pleased with the outcome of my divorce procedure. David Gonzalez is a very honest attorney who will guide you in your legal matters. David is very knowledgeable in all aspects of law. He has handled various cases for my family and we are all pleased with our results. David handled my divorce efficiently and he will be the first attorney I will call in the future. Thank you David.

I needed an attorney to set up a living trust for us, and although this isn't David's primarily specialty, he handled it professionally, knowledgeably, and efficiently.  His prices were very reasonable as well.  If you want someone you can trust with your legal needs, and someone who actually cares about you as a person, not just a paycheck, David is a great choice.  Very thorough and great to work with!

I have recommended Attorney Gonzalez to several family members and friends because of his integrity and track record. Not only is he an honest attorney who cares about his clients and tells you the truth, but he is experienced and uses his knowledge to do whatever possible to help clients win a case. His drive and attention to detail is what separates Mr. Gonzalez from most lawyers who only are interested in your money. If you need a results oriented attorney who sticks with you from start to finish, call David.

I originally contacted Mr. Gonzalez for a child custody case in 2004.  I appreciated his honesty when he advised me that going to court would not be in my best interest nor in my children's. Not many attorney's would be so honest. Due to his honesty, I have returned to him over the past 10 years.  Although we did not go to court, he has helped me various times in custody matters including assisting my 18 year old son, who was still under a court order due to being in high school, define his legal stance.  Despite his family law knowledge, I was greatly pleased when I learned of his experience in other legal fields.  He has assisted me not only with my custody issues over the past 10 years but also with an injury and support issues. One of the qualities that I admired most was his availability along with his personal and professional attention. Of all the attorney's that I have dealt with (a total of 6 over the past 19 years) Mr. Gonzalez is the most professional and ethical one I have dealt with.  I consider him more than my attorney but  a person that I can turn to for honest guidance.
Mr. Gonzalez's integrity, experience, and knowledge of the judicial system is why I use his services.
thank you jeff for all your help! very helpful will highly recommend lakeshore law center to anyone.--Jeanelle

I searched for hours upon hours to find good tenant law attorneys. I was fortunate to finally find Jeff and Macy at Lakeshore Law. They successfully defended me from a retaliatory eviction. Every other attorney office I called didn't seem to "get it", but when I spoke to Jeff on the phone, I could tell he was very sharp and quick to take action. Macy is intelligent, answered my questions quickly, and worked tirelessly on our case. I would confidentially recommend Lakeshore Law if you are going through the stress of a retaliatory eviction.

I had an issue with a big corporation that required legal support.  All the attorneys I spoke with leading up to meeting Jeffrey, seemed to not be interested in upsetting or challenging the corporation.  Jeffrey was willing to help represent "David" who was  against "Goliath".  I appreciate Jeffrey's willingness to help me in a time of need.

I’ve been struggling with significant debt and was feeling extremely anxious. I contacted over 20 lawyers before finding Jeffery, who was highly recommended on a professional website with five-star reviews. From the beginning, he took my side and worked hard to protect my consumer rights, helping me avoid major financial losses. Despite my limited English, Jeffery has been incredibly patient and has always been there to guide me through legal disputes. He is trustworthy, professional, and truly cares about his clients. I am deeply grateful for his help and highly recommend him.

I cannot recommend Jeff and Macy at Lakeshore Law Center enough! I was overwhelmed with a massive amount of debt from a creditor, and they worked tirelessly to get it completely removed from my credit report. The rush of relief I felt when Jeff emailed me the letter of deletion from the creditor was absolutely priceless.

Throughout the entire process, Jeff and Macy were incredibly thorough, professional, and detail-oriented. They left no stone unturned and kept me informed every step of the way. Their kindness, patience, and ability to explain the process clearly made an otherwise stressful situation so much easier to handle.

This was my first time dealing with lawyers in any capacity, and I’m so glad I found them. If you’re looking for a team that truly cares about their clients and delivers results, Lakeshore Law Center is the place to go!

Lakeshore Law Center has the absolute best team. When I was at my worst, Mr. Wilen's did everything he could to help me navigate such a difficult time in my life. If there is anybody that is out there that is in need of legal assistance, Lakeshore Law Center is the place to go. I called so many other lawyers but Mr. Wilen's actually cares.
Macy was extremely helpful and very knowledgeable. She helped me reach the outcome I wanted and did so in a timely manner. I’m very grateful and recommend this law firm.
I had a great experience with lakeshore law center. Very professional, great communication and easy to work with. They are the reason why I won my eviction case. I would highly recommend them!

I had called so many different law offices with my wrongful eviction case and was lucky to find this one! From the start I spoke with Jeffrey and he was very detailed and direct! Communication was great! Macy was extremely helpful the entire time! I cannot thank Lakeshore Law Center enough. They helped us through one of the hardest times and made everything so easy and got us the justice we deserved. I'd recommend them to anyone! They are the best!
I was impressed with Jeffrey's demeanor and knowledge in handling my matter. He was thoroughly professional and ensured that we got a satisfactory outcome. I would absolutely recommend his services.

I am very glad I found Jeffrey and Macy to handle my case. They quickly understood my case and clearly explained the steps they will take and the potential outcomes. My case concluded sooner than I expected with the outcome I wanted. I will definitely work with them again.

We truly appreciate all the hard work and effort that went into helping us, and we would absolutely recommend him to anyone looking for an attorney they can trust.

Thank you again for everything!

reviews.text: Best attorney !! If you need an important case handled then he has got your back !

reviews.text: I am incredibly grateful I came across Steven K. Blooms number!! reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your review. I really appreciate the kind words. Just tonight, a colleague of mine asked me if I bought the information about people getting cited/arrested and sent out mailers to solicit their business. I don’t, never have and never will. I put myself in the shoes of someone in this situation and I would feel that my privacy was invaded if I received these unsolicited letters after an embarrassing time. I respect peoples’ privacy and will only reach out to people that want my assistance.

I’m glad you found me and that I could help achieve the outcome you deserved. Take care! Steve

Steve helped me and my family resolve a DUI case involving several serious charges. Before hiring him, we spoke to a family friend in the Orange County Sheriff's Department who recommended that we prioritize looking for a lawyer who is not only well established in OC but also has extensive experience with the court handling our case, North Justice Court. After interviewing several lawyers around the area, Steve became the clear choice as he is extremely knowledgable about the various judges, prosecutors, and clerks at North Justice and also has many personal connections with those people.

The case itself was not easy and a very difficult and exasperating process, but Steve had a very well thought out game plan and was able to execute it while doing his best to keep us reassured the entire way. We are happy with the results that included reduced charges and a significant reduction in fines.

reviews.text: I called Steven Bloom to represent my daughter one day before her arraignment. Not only did he take the case, he used his knowledge of domestic violence and self-defense and miraculously was able to get the case thrown out!!!! This situation could have been a nightmare for the victim (who was arrested after calling the police in self-defense) however, Mr. Bloom listened intently, asked the right questions and knew what he needed to do moving forward. If you need an attorney to represent you, and your searching for an honest lawyer who can get the job done, then LOOK NO FURTHER! Mr. Bloom is smart, quick-on-his-feet and has influence in Orange County! My family and I would hire him again, no questions asked!

It had been five years since I celebrated my birthday back in California due to being stationed in DC, when I was arrested for "fighting in public" in the Downtown Fullerton area.  I have never been in trouble with the law up until this point so after the police released several hours later with an absurd citation and possible charges I was immediately riddled with questions and concerns with what was next to come.  I interviewed one lawyer over the phone and after explaining the situation the first question out of their mouth was, "can you leave me your number, so I can get back to you?". After spending 15 minutes explaining the situation you'd think they'd have more to say.  I hung up.
I googled "Lawyers in Fullerton" and Steven's practice was the first to pop up with GREAT REVIEWS, including a bio on his work and achievements.  I felt the need to have a face to face interview, so I popped into his office without an appointment and his secretary immediately greeted me and informed him I was there to speak with him.  After greeting me he invited me into his office and gave me a free consultation with the option of working with him or just taking advice and he DID NOT try to use the scare tactic approach with me.  He gave me a viable option, and I chose to hire him.
After a short amount of time of the citation going through the filing process, Steven was able to get the case rejected by the DA's office and advocated on my behalf in a completely PROFESSIONAL and TIMELY MANNER.  Because of his HARD WORK and DEDICATION, I was able to breath again without feeling a huge weight on my shoulder and I owe a great amount of stress relief and productivity to his practice.  He is a direct-approach person with GOOD INTENTIONS who just so happens to be MILITARY FRIENDLY.  Thank you Steve, you were a great deal of help to me and my career!

Mr. Bloom was recommended through a friend and known as one of the best attorneys in Orange County.  He treated me like family the moment I walked in his office.  Any questions I had he took the time to explain thoroughly in detail.  He was always responsive and reachable through phone or email.  He fought for my case and received results that would have been unmatchable with any other lawyer.  I would HIGHLY recommend Mr. Bloom to anyone as he provided amazing representation and results!

I was fortunate to have found him online, and was even more fortunate to have Mr. Bloom worked very well with the DAs not to press charge against me.  I am vietnamese, and Mr. Bloom understands vietnamese cultures which enabled Mr. Bloom to defend me very successfully.   Mr. Bloom is the best criminal defense attorney whom I am so fortunate to find online, and to have him represent me.  I am forever grateful to his excellent work.

I will be grateful to him for the rest of my life

I bumped a car in a parking lot, got out, did not see damage, left the scene, and was charged with a misdemeanor hit and run.
I hired Steven Bloom as my attorney, and he was able to dismissed my case. Awesome Attorney !!!!

His honesty and beyond fair price was the first reason I hired Steven K Bloom. It was one of the best decisions I ever made. I quickly realized that he is well known and respected in the Orange County Court System. He handled my case very professionally, and he kept me feeling confident through my entire case. At the end of my case all charges against me were dropped. I feel confident in saying, if I had hired some other attorney, the results would not have been the same. He went above and beyond the call of duty for me. If you want the best defense that you can possibly have, I highly recommend Steven K Bloom.

Thank you again Steve, I am very grateful for your services

I was arrested for a crime that was going to have a serious impact on my future & ability to achieve any success in life. The District Attorney had absolutely no interest in hearing the facts of the case & wanted to move forward with the case based on my prior convictions.  I obtained a public defender that despite his best efforts was unable to negotiate a plea bargain of any kind with the District Attorneys’ office. At one of my court appearances I was observing Steven represent one of his clients.  I was blown away with what I saw; I thought for sure this guy was going to jail. The mutual respect Steven shared with the D.A. was obvious & worked in his clients favor resulting in a reduced charge, no jail time & the minimum fine with a small amount of community service. I was facing serious jail time & had exhausted all options. I hired Steven & the results were immediate. The D.A. agreed to a smaller amount of jail time & although still expensive a much lesser fine. Steven said  “We can do better Chris”.  That sentence really sums up my experience with Steven, when Steven said “We” he meant it. The fight for my future became Stevens & he was determined to attain the best outcome possible. Steven treated me & everyone involved with the up most respect. As an 8 year veteran & a Non Commissioned Officer I know the meaning of respect, integrity & loyalty, Steven exemplifies all of these qualities. In the end I received NO jail time & a very, very small fine. I did have to plead guilty, however Steven followed through with my case & was able to have my probation terminated early along with my record being expunged. I now have a clean record & was able to attain an amazing job that had been lost now that my background check was clean.  I HAVE A FUTURE AGAIN. If you have a case in Orange County, especially Fullerton you NEED Steven Bloom as your attorney. I can thank you enough Steven thank you for making the impossible possible again.

Mr. Bloom is An Amazing Attorney!!

I can not thank Mr. Bloom enough for his dedication and commitment with my case. From the first min I met with Mr. Bloom, Bloom did everything in his power to make my case process go smoothly for me. His knowledge, expertise, and how every thing was handled was nothing less then professional.
Mr. Bloom is patient, polite, ALWAYS keeps you up to date on your case, has an eye for detail, and just a natural born criminal defense attorney. In terms of pricing he is very fair and reasonable.
Overall, I received outstanding service and he exceeded my expectation. I HIGHLY recommend Mr. Bloom
Steven is very professional and amazingly knowledgeable.  He made the whole process easier and successfully achieved a positive judgement - full custody - closed case.  Thanks a million Steven

Steve is an amazing lawyer who has help me through the entire ordeal of getting a DUI. Steve was able to get me no jail, just a fine and a class. I don't have a criminal background  but I'm judged based on my appearance . (tattoos) Steve took my case which was a rocky one and I can honestly say I really didnt think I was gonna win. Even tho I was innocent. I really thought the judge would look at me based on my looks and believe the lies of the other party. But he made sure that didnt happen and he got my case thrown out! THANK YOU steve bloom.

My name is Walter Santizo, I called Steve Bloom when I became aware of potentially bad situation for my friend Jose.  Once I found out that people had lied and manipulated us I approached Steven about our retainer.  Steven is an honest person and a good lawyer.  I see that he has had a lot of success with my friend and continues to show he is a valuable person to have on your team.  I fully endorse Steven Bloom and would recommend him to anybody.

To begin,

Steven K. Bloom is an amazing attorney! He is extremely talented, professional, compassionate, intelligent, and forthright.

To contextualize,

I found out my girlfriend of 3 years was having an affair. We had an apartment, a 2 year old daughter, an entire life together. I had to move out of my apartment and begin my life all over from scratch.

A couple of days after I left, I found out that she filed a police report alleging that I had made threats against her life and that of the guy she cheated on me with. Two and a half weeks later, after sharing the baby 50-50, she files a Temporary Restraining Order alleging that I had been abusing her and that I was a threat to her life, my daughter's life, and myself. Of course she filed the TRO in order to gain an advantage in our pending custody case in LA county which I had filed a few days before.

I felt so helpless and lost, not only was I betrayed but I was now facing the possibility of jail time and never seeing my daughter again.

This is when Steven K. Bloom stepped in, in an almost super hero fashion, he defended me against the allegations of domestic violence and terrorist threats. When we were sitting in the court hearing for the TRO, I felt as if I was watching a movie because Mr. Bloom's performance was immaculate and powerful. He defended me, my credibility, and my reputation as he destroyed my Ex's allegations and argument.

I can honestly say that I am indebted to this man and he is now my official "go to guy" in case I ever need a lawyer. He helped me clear up my name; he reunited me with my daughter; he helped me get my car back which my ex had kept because of the TRO; most importantly, he gave me peace of mind throughout this whole tumultuous experience.

If you retain him for your legal needs, you will definitely not be sorry!

reviews.text: Marty Burbank was recommended to me through the Alzhiemer's Association. And I would like to double down and tell you why I recommended Mr. Burbank. Me and my wife are retired school teachers of some 64+ years. My wife had to retire to Alzhiemer's and I retired to care for her. Mr Burbank without charge, gave me advice as to how to do a will where my wife would be taken care and how to make it the person we picked to take over her care. His advice saved me a lot of money and he received no financial gain. Alzhiemer's Association was right. I highly recommend Marty Burbank as the first choice in legal advice when it comes to caring for loved ones. Thank you, I have your number and will call you again, I am sure of it.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your story and for your incredibly kind words. It means a great deal to me.
Caring for a spouse with Alzheimer's is one of the most challenging things anyone can face, and your dedication to your wife is truly admirable. After 64+ years of serving students and families as educators, you both deserve all the support available during this difficult time.
I'm honored that the Alzheimer's Association connected us, and I'm glad I could provide guidance that helped you plan for your wife's care and future. That's exactly why I do this work.
Please know that my door is always open. Don't hesitate to call whenever you need advice or just want to talk through what's ahead. You and your wife are in my thoughts.
With gratitude and respect,
Marty Burbank
OC Elder Law

reviews.text: Attorney Kim helped my mom a few years ago for a conservatorship (of my brother). She was recommended by our family friends. The job was done neatly and quickly at a reasonable fee, so I recently went to her a few weeks ago at her new location. Her new receptionists only spoke English, but Attorney Kim was fluent in both languages. She's helping me draft a premarital agreement with my fiance, and I can tell that she's very knowledgeable. We are thoroughly happy.

I had a horrible experience here at Jeannie H Kim's Law Firm. I met with Jeannie Kim face to face at her office and she said whatever she needed to say for us to hand over $8,500. $3,500 from Civil representation and $5,000 for Criminal representation (WHEN I WAS THE VICTIM).

Jeannie Kim is now alleging that she NEVER worked on my case and NEVER got paid by Fred Lee for legal services on my case. Apparently, she was only renting a room from Fred Lee's office and denies any sort of association with Fred Lee or his practice.

If that were the case, why did she meet with me not just once but TWICE? At the first meeting, we sat down with Fred Lee for a brief time and then he introduced us to Jeannie Kim as his associate. We then met with her and she asked us for the court documents. We gave her the documents. She reviewed the documents and asked us some fact finding type of questions and then told us that it would be $3,500.00 to pursue the civil case and $5,000.00 for the criminal case. I remember she was so happy when we turned over those checks.

Her name is also on the signature line of the retainer agreement.

She never informed me that she was in no way associated with Fred Lee or his firm.

She met with me a second time a few months later to provide me legal advice. I recall her telling me that since the defendants were over 18 years of age, any judgment would not be enforceable against their parents. I also recall her telling me that I could continue to pursue the case. It took almost 2 years from this meeting for the civil complaint to be filed. Once the complaint was filed, the case was then dismissed few months later without my knowledge or authorization. Later I found out that I had the option of obtaining a default judgment against one of the defendants without any additional costs. Now it is too late to do anything about it.

Jeannie Kim is now contending that I have made untruthful comments and made a mistake in the subject matter and failure to remove my derogatory in nature comments will constitute aggravated defamation and libel with malice.

Everything I'm saying here is TRUE and the facts STRONGLY lead to the conclusion that Jeannie Kim was working with Fred Lee to make a sale.
reviews.ownerResponse:
David,

We are sorry to hear of your negative experience with Law Offices of Frederick Lee. As we have previously mentioned, please be informed that our firm, JHK LAW FIRM, never had any affiliation with Law Offices of Frederick Lee and still have no association with them.

We have been informed that an arbitration for attorney fees took place. If our firm had anything to do with your concern at issue, we would have been involved in the arbitration; which we were not.

If there is some clarification you require from us, or if there is anything we can be of service to you, please directly contact our office. I hope that this time, we have clarified our position effectively.

Thank you.

Heidi--

reviews.text: I had a good experience working with this office. I would pick Cliff again if given the opportunity. And Jenny is always pleasant.

Caring, patient, understanding and very capable staff.
Cliff and his entire staff fought and won my case although other lawyers won't  take my case because trying to prove I was injured and unable to work the first 5 years after my injure would be challenging.  Cliff was confident that he was able to win the court trial which he did.
Just be patient and understanding,  don't think its a quick thing because its not. You'll most likely have a  court hearing to settle but I  the end you will be happy you went with Berkley Law.

Really disappointed in this law firm. I was communicating with Andrea through email since I don't have a phone. I did everything she requested. I filled out the disability packet. Once she received it, I've been completely blown off and ignored by her. Today is May 15. I last heard from her April 15th. From April 15th up until today, I have sent 4 separate emails. I've heard of people ghosting in relationships but never with a law firm. I understand this firm handles many cases but nobody is too busy to send a response to at least keep someone in the loop of what's going on. Out of courtesy. To at least give some status of whats to come after submitting the packet. You don't ignore email after email for a month straight.

I need help with a permanent disability claim and while an attorney turned me down and another never even responded, Cliff did not. He listened to me intently as I explained my situation, and his response demonstrated his thorough understanding of how this process works, and his approach gave me hope. He has answered all my questions promptly, even during this busy season when most people are off. A win is never guaranteed, and we are still in the preliminary stages of the process, but I feel supported and confident that I have a fighter on my side, especially since compensation is contingent on getting a win. I will update this review as the process progresses, and the rank of the review will not depend on the outcome nearly as much as on how my claim is handled along the way, and so far, it's a 5 star, emerald diamond rating. Thank you Cliff!

5 out of 5 stars until higher is an option!

My case was an outlier. My medical facts were bullet proof, but the circumstances around it made the matter tedious and extremely complicated for the courts to deal with.

The cribs notes version is as follows. People who adopted me under false pretenses lead themselves to believe that they had something to gain by not signing me up for disability as a child. They lied about my eligibility for disability benefits and their perfidy was not discovered by myself or by my doctors for many years, until after the conventional opportunities to apply for child disability had expired.

Cliff Berkley and his staff fixed this.

That was no small task. It was a long and arduous battle, multiple other disability advocates declined to take the case, but in time it worked out.

Furthermore, neither Cliff, nor his staff ever complained about my case. They never came right out and said it but my knee jerk assumption has to be that with the time and effort it took to win my case, they could have won three conventional cases for exactly that much more money.

Even after the trial, when there appeared to be some nascent "issues and deliberations" about whether or not certain social security branches were going to follow through with the judges orders and fulfill their duties, the Berkley office was still there to grease the wheels and make sure the process kept chugging.

Bottom line, I don't believe I could have gotten a better outcome with a different team. The time the courts takes to process these cases is not a reflection of the attorneys and the advocates who wish to perform chivalrous battle in them, if your medical facts meet the federal guidelines for disability, consider working with Cliff Berkley, and keep plinking away at the system until your fingers fall off.

Special shout outs are also due to Jenni, and the nice lady over the phone whos first name probably isn't "Berkley's Office how may I help you", but this is how I know her. There are likely others behind them as well. Thank you all very much!
Finally got my disability benefits. Cliff was persistent and never let up on my case. I am so grateful for everyone at Berkley Disability.

Hi cliff it is me Prince. Thanks for the call today. It made my day. I've been disabled since 2019 and have applied multiple times and was denied. It wasn't since I searched to find a disability advocate and lucky I was because I found Berkeley disability, they went right to work after after the first time we spoke. Cliff and the staff are very knowledgeable on social security disability and social security income and all the necessary steps that you need to take to get approved for your claim. It will take awhile so be patient, one thing to remember is don't give up and don't quit keep appealing every decision until you see the law judge. Just know that Cliff and his amazing team had your back and will continue to fight on your behalf. Thank you cliff and thank you Samantha for all your extraordinary help during one of the toughest times in my life. I truly appreciate you and everything you stand for. God bless you, your family, and your wonderful team.

I am very thankful and grateful to Cliff Berkley and his staff! Especially Jenni who was helping me with all my medical records. They are all amazing! From start to finish this team was very exceptional, professional, and efficient. They make you feel like family and give you the best customer service and advice they can. And they never let you give up hope. I got approved after an appeal which they proficiently prepared and submitted for me.
I would highly recommend Berkely Disability to anyone looking for someone to help them with SSDI.

reviews.text:
I filed my SSDI claim with the assistance of Berkeley Disability; they took my case immediately after a free, sit down interview. This was in 2015; they filed retroactively to 2014 for me.  After they took my case, I didn’t have to do anything except keep seeing my primary care doctor, specialists, take my prescriptions, and give them the records for everything.  I was denied initially and at a review stage, and they had told me I was likely to be denied at these initial stages during my first consultation interview.  However, because they had prepared me for a 2 to 3 year fight, I continued doing what they told me to do; I saw my Medi-Cal doctors regularly and struggled to make ends meet. When I finally had my hearing in front of a judge, Berkley Disability was there to make sure I presented and spoke about myself and my disability the way I needed to.  Just like they had told me at the beginning, that most approvals come after seeing the judge, I received my “fully favorable” decision about four weeks after my hearing, and started receiving monthly benefits about six weeks after that.

I had a high paying job for many years before becoming disabled. Berkley Disability helped me win $2000 a month in benefits for myself, $1000 a month in benefits for my children, and over $100,000 in back pay benefits for myself and my kids.  I could not recommend any disability attorney more enthusiastically; if you are disabled and can’t work, this office will win your SSDI case if you follow their advice.
Amazing people who really want to help you!
Love these guys.  They see me through everything,  so polite and caring

The Berkley Law firm is an outstanding performer in  Social Security litigation.

They went above and beyond my expectations to win my SS case.

I highly recommend the Berkley Law Firm and tell everyone I meet to pay them a visit if you want excellent SS representation.

Thank you

Thank you

This place came highly recommended. that was far from the case. i signed all the documents for them to represent me in my case, but when i reached out my attorney had no idea who I was. so moving forward. i had a deposition, we had 30 minutes to prep for. in that 30 minutes he took another call for 10 minutes. then we had a court date that he didnt show up for. the judge had to order someone to get ahold of him. He never call back or returns emails. I felt like i was doing this all alone. in my opinion if you are looking for someone to help and CARE about you, look else where. they never once asked how I was doing. Just my honest opinion.

I would highly recommend Shon and his team to anyone in need of a worker’s compensation attorney. They played a key role in helping me navigate a challenging situation and regain stability.

My only feedback would be the lack of communication between myself and the office. I found that I had to take the initiative in reaching out to address my needs and updates to my case.
