Been about 4 years since I hired them. Only gotten 1 retuned phone call. Only been able to get ahold of my lawyer on the phone about 3 times. Every time I call he's either not their or busy. I have zero idea of what has been going on with my case or where it stands. They have promised to mail me my case info at least 3 times. Never did. I feel like the lawyer abandoned my case with out letting me know. All I've ever asked for was a simple update on the case. But apparently that's to difficult. So now what am I supposed to do?

Attorney Cheng was referred to me by a really good broker Loc Pham to assist with the sale of my practice.  This was a start up practice I'v built from scratch for 7 years and wanted to exit this business and relocate.
I had several years remaining on the lease contract and wanted to be sure I will be indemnified from the Landlord should the new buyers default on the lease.

Attorney Cheng previously was a licensed practicing Dentist and thus with his dual degree in law has a wealth of knowledge to represent both buyer and seller in the purchase/sale of any dental practice. He is very professional, responsive, and thorough with the work the does to protect his clients.  I am very pleased with his services and would highly recommend him to anyone needing legal counsel on any Dental transactions and matters.

Originally was referred to Jeng and Associates via Solhi Law Firm (has since changed name) which was the firm I consulted with initially regarding my WC claim.  After learning that Jeng and Associates were my assigned counsel, and finally getting the process going, I was able to work with my Atty. via phone and email.

He was able to secure a settlement with the third party claims indemnity ( they represented my former employer) and through a few hurdles, he was able to get my scheduled deposition with defense atty. into an informal settlement offer meeting (I did not have to attend a deposition) AND, my Atty. was able to approach defense with a settlement amount I was seeking that he was able to get them to agree to (I did not have to attend the settlement meeting). He kept in communication with me and proved very knowledgeable and empathic to the pain and suffering I was going through, while offering different options and legal advice.

I felt he was representing me in my best interest rather than his own or his office’s, The settlement was received in a timely manner.

Overall, satisfied with my case outcome and the representation Jeng and Associates provided me and my Family.  I would recommend their services to any who was wrongly treated by an employer after a workplace injury.

Throughout the process, Nate made sure to keep me informed every step of the way, and never left me feeling uncertain or confused. The level of communication was exceptional, and I always felt like I knew exactly where things stood. He treated me like family from the very start!

They proposed a flat fee that seemed very reasonable, especially compared to the high hourly rates I had been quoted. When I signed on with the firm and began working with Dan Moffatt, I was impressed that he was incredibly responsive to my inquiries, was on top of deadlines, asked to meet with me several times to discuss the case, researched the opposing counsel, and more. I never felt like he worked less hard than an hourly-paid attorney--just the opposite. He was very thorough, as though being paid by the hour. We ended up going to court three times, yet the flat fee I paid covered the whole case, from beginning to end. Clearly, it's not just about the money with Dan Moffatt. Besides his integrity, I am also very impressed with his competence. He had a strong sense of how to handle my case, and if I ever disagreed with his instincts, he communicated clearly and helped me understand his viewpoint. reviews.text:
Where do I even begin? Jeff Kent is more than a lawyer… he’s a guardian angel. I’ve never faced any type of crime in all my years of life. I’ve never been arrested, and I’ve never even had issues with traffic tickets.

During the Christmas season, I had a little side hustle where I sold replica AirPods that were definitely fake. Honestly, it was hard to believe anyone didn’t know they weren’t real because I was selling them for $30–$50 each. My customers loved them, kept coming back, and even sent me referrals. If someone asked if they were fake, I’d just tell them to try them out and let me know what they thought. They’d test them, like them, and buy them. If they broke, I’d replace them for free. I convinced myself I was doing a good service.

Did I think I was doing something wrong? Honestly, I had convinced myself that I wasn’t. But that didn’t matter—what I was doing was wrong. One day, I was arrested in an undercover sting operation after selling about $400 worth of AirPods to a plainclothes police officer. They said the value was worth more than $3,000 if they were real. That led to me being taken to the police station, booked, and charged with a felony. Yes—a felony. Mugshot and everything. I bailed myself out, but I was completely humiliated.

I have a life insurance license that I’ve held for years, and suddenly I was terrified I’d lose it. I also thought I was going to lose my job. I’d never felt so alone. I was embarrassed to tell anyone, extremely anxious, and I couldn’t even focus on work. On top of that, I had to report the arrest to the Department of Insurance. The thought of losing my career and everything I had worked for was crushing.

I reached out to a few different lawyers for consultations, but none of them made me feel comfortable. Then I called Jeff. From the very first appointment, he made me feel good about the situation and reassured me that he’d do his best. And he did better than that—he got my entire case dismissed in just a few months! Normally, this would have taken 6 months to a year (or longer), but Jeff made it happen in under 5 months. That’s unbelievable.

I was expecting the worst, but Jeff stayed positive and kept me calm and informed every step of the way. In the end, I didn’t have to pay any restitution at all. All I had to do was complete 10 hours of community service. That was it. And now, I don’t have to report this arrest anywhere on any application. I can legally answer “NO, I HAVE NOT BEEN ARRESTED.” I have a clean record as if nothing ever happened—and I’m so thankful for that.

Integrity and ethics mean everything, and I let that slip for a moment when I was chasing extra Christmas money. Not all money is good money, and I’ve learned my lesson the hard way. But I’m so thankful that Jeff gave me another chance. He’s patient, calm, and answered all my questions (even when I asked the same one over and over). I walked into his office a nervous wreck, but he always made me feel comfortable.

And this is important: I saw Jeff before those long months of fear set in. If I hadn’t, I don’t know how I would’ve made it through. For months, I lived with that fear, not knowing if I’d face jail time or if my professional license would be gone forever—but Jeff carried me through it.

Whatever money you’re thinking about spending on a lawyer—spend it with Jeff. It’s absolutely worth it. He has the skills, the knowledge, and the relationships to get the best possible outcome. I read a lot of reviews before I chose him, and I’m so glad I did. I hope my review helps you the same way others helped me.

Jeff isn’t just a great lawyer—he’s a good father, a good friend, and a genuine human being. I couldn’t eat or think straight for weeks and months, but Jeff took that weight off me and gave me peace of mind. He’s not just a lawyer, he’s a lifesaver.

Jeff, thank you for everything you’ve done and for staying patient with me. I’ll forever be grateful. If you’re on the fence, don’t hesitate—book your consultation with him. I promise you, it’s worth it.

Jeff Kent may be an attorney by title, but this man genuinely cares about the welfare of his clients. I’ve made a series of poor choices in my life, many of which were heavily influenced by the curse of addiction. I continue to work on bettering my life, and part of that involves cleaning up the wreckage of my past.

Recently, I discovered I had outstanding warrants from 2009. I initially thought I it was just a paperwork issue I could handle on my own, but I was wrong. By trying to manage it myself, I ended up violating probation, with another 1.5 years hanging over my head. That’s when I reached out to Jeff and explained the situation.

This man is a true professional with an brilliant understanding of the legal system. He enters my situation with a solid plan, executed flawlessly, and got results that I honestly thought were impossible.
I finally had peace of mind. I could sleep at night, no longer looking over my shoulder. I’ve been able to move on, make amends for my past mistakes, and begin building an honest life. Jeff made all of this possible. He genuinely cared about me as a person and believed in my efforts to turn my life around.

As for those two warrants, my probation violation, and the 1.5 years hanging over my head? I didn’t even need to appear in court. The warrants were vacated, and my probation was terminated.

Thank you Jeff, from  the bottom of my heart!

reviews.text:
Like many others on this page, searching for a defense attorney likely means you're at a difficult and uncertain crossroads in your life. Whatever the reason, we all make mistakes, and through my own experience, I can say the legal system is not designed to help those who are scared and uninformed. That’s where Jeff Kent comes in.

Two years ago, I met Jeff during one of the most stressful times of my life. I was overwhelmed with anxiety and honestly believed my life was over. From our very first meeting, Jeff took the time to listen, was empathetic, and helped me regain my sense of direction. Initially, I pushed back on some of his suggestions, thinking I knew better. Looking back, I realize how wrong I was. If you want to see a master at work in the courtroom, look no further than Jeff. His experience and professional relationships go far beyond what you’d expect from a typical defense attorney. From day one, he knew exactly how to guide me through the process.

Jeff was always available when I had questions, never sugar-coated the reality of my situation, and was consistently honest about the best course of action to mitigate my case. I followed his advice to the letter, and gradually, my panic began to subside as we moved through the months of court proceedings. With each court appearance, my hope for a positive outcome grew stronger, and I always felt confident with Jeff by my side.

In the end, Jeff resolved my case, and I never spent a single day in jail. I had state prison looming over me, and now, I’m writing this from home. I still have my family, my home, and my job — things I believe I would have lost without Jeff Kent. There’s no one else I’d trust to guide me through such a challenging time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words. I'm really glad to hear that I was able to provide the guidance and support you needed during such a difficult time. I retained him 17 months ago.  A lot of stuff is promised up front.  He sounds very knowledgeable.  But once I paid the retainer everything sort of fell back.  We do a hour long phone call to get a baseline for the case.  Guess what?  He forgets to record it so he has no notes.  But he charges be $500 for it.  Then asked me every time after that to re-explain myself because he did not have the notes.  So I get charged about another $1,000 for all the misunderstanding after this.

All these promises are made about the case and what he is going to do.  But once it is actually there it is just "well CA law is just this and the judge will do what he does."  No trying to do anything just simple black and white.  Why am I even paying this guy?

Now fast forward to today.  He just drops me.  I am paid in full.  I have a court date in 6 weeks.  He just drops me out of the blue cause he does not want to deal with this simple case. Then he has the nerve to send an invoice.  He was suppose to be sending invoices every month. It has been 17 months and this is the first invoice I have ever received.  It says he is dropping me and I do not have any refund at all.  He did not do anything.  Just collected $5,000 and has not progressed the case one single bit.  It is more of a mess than it was 17 months ago.

Stay as far away from this guy as you can.

I recently had the privilege of working with an outstanding family court lawyer, Jeffrey Isles, and I must say that my experience exceeded all expectations. Finding oneself in the midst of a family dispute is an incredibly challenging and emotionally draining situation, but Mr. Isles adeptly guided me through the complexity of the legal process, providing a lifeline during one of the most difficult times in my life.

From the moment I reached out to Mr. Isles for assistance, his professionalism and dedication was evident. He promptly scheduled an initial consultation, during which Jeffrey Isles exhibited an exceptional ability to listen attentively and empathize with my situation. His compassionate approach created a safe and supportive environment, allowing me to share the details of my case openly and honestly.

What truly set Jeffrey Isles apart from others was their unwavering commitment to my case. (Which lasted one full year.) He demonstrated a deep understanding of the nuances of family law, leveraging his extensive knowledge and expertise to develop a strategic plan tailored specifically to my unique circumstances. Mr. Isles consistently provided clear and concise explanations of legal proceedings, enabling me to make well-informed decisions throughout the process.

Furthermore, Jeffrey Isles was always readily available to address any questions or concerns I had along the way. His responsiveness was truly remarkable, promptly returning calls and emails to ensure that I felt supported and informed at all times. This level of communication was pivotal in alleviating the anxiety and uncertainty that often accompany legal matters, allowing me to trust Jeffrey Isles fully.

During courtroom appearances, Mr. Isles displayed exceptional advocacy skills. He presented my case with passion, poise, and an unwavering commitment to securing the best possible outcome for my family. His attention to detail was remarkable, leaving no stone unturned to build a strong and persuasive argument in my favor. It was truly awe-inspiring to witness his expertise firsthand.

Not only was Jeffrey Isles an exceptional legal representative, but they also navigated the emotional complexities of my case with grace and compassion. He exhibited genuine care for the well-being of my family, offering invaluable guidance and support throughout the process. Jeffrey Isles consistently ensured that I felt heard, valued, and empowered, allaying my fears and providing a sense of hope during a trying time.

In the end, Jeffrey Isles achieved a favorable resolution for my family, exceeding my expectations and providing closure to an emotionally draining ordeal. I am deeply grateful for his unwavering support, tireless dedication, and exceptional legal expertise that helped turn a difficult situation into a new beginning.

If you are searching for a family court lawyer who exemplifies integrity, professionalism, and unwavering dedication to their clients, look no further than Jeffrey Isles. His exceptional skills, unparalleled expertise, and compassionate approach make them truly exceptional in their field. I wholeheartedly recommend Jeffrey Isles to anyone seeking legal representation in family court matters. Working with him was an absolute blessing, and I am forever grateful for his steadfast support.

Thank you, Jeff, for being a true advocate in every sense of the word and for helping my family find justice and a fresh start.

Sincerely,

Lauro & Eugenia Hernandez

reviews.text:
I highly recommend Jimmy as a criminal defense lawyer in the OC area. My goal was for my case was dismissal, and Jimmy successfully got my case dismissed.

For my attorney search, I scoped out to 4 lawyers, and Jimmy was my confident choice for a few reasons. He is not only highly proficient in keeping up to date in the amending OC laws, but he’s also extremely knowledgeable and efficient in navigating through the OC court system.

1. Local knowledge of Anahiem court system - After I provided details of my case during my consultation call, he gave me a very detailed run down of the court that my arraignment was to take place (changes in judge rotations, arraignment room number, pre-trial room, etc…). He’s been practicing law in OC since 2004 and is ingrained in the local judicial community (active member in North County Bar Association). I felt assured that he had a good reputation with the Anahiem lawyer community (lawyers and judges). Jimmy also informed me that his office is a mile away from North Justice Center and that he represents all of his clients (no associate substitute).

2. Ease of communication - Because Jimmy works directly with all of his clients (no associates), I had direct access to him via phone, text, and email. He answered all my questions within the day. He would always give me a heads up when he would be unavailable (because he was at court) and followed up with a timeframe of answering back.

3. Proactivity - After my consultation call (before I made the decision to hire Jimmy and was scoping additional lawyers), he went out of his way to update me about a timely announcement from Jennifer Contini’s (Chief Deputy Anahiem City Attorney) that may positively impact my overall situation. I was honestly surprised that Jimmy took the time to call and update me even though I wasn’t officially his client. It made a deep impression. After I officially hired Jimmy, he was clear in my next action items to strengthen a dismissal outcome.

In summary, I chose the right lawyer for me, I felt very well represented, and Jimmy delivered to get the outcome I wanted. I know how intimidating, hectic, and confusing it can be to hire a lawyer, so I hope this review helps others in their attorney search.
reviews.ownerResponse: I really appreciate you taking the time to leave such an amazing review. I'm glad I was able to get you the outcome we were striving for.

Jimmy Cha is the best!
He's got your back !

I was arrested for my 3rd DUI in Fullerton, a separate charge of driving on a suspended license for the 4th time, and 3 probation violations. One of the probation violations required 120 days in jail as I previously violated probation on that case before. I was suppose to go to the North Justice Center in Fullerton for the 2 new cases and the probation violations. I didn't know what to do.

I was looking at 1 year in jail on the 3rd DUI, 180 days on the driving on the suspended license since this was my 4th, 120 days on one probation violation, and who knows how much more time on the other 2 violations.

I spoke to some of my friends, and they all referred me to Jimmy saying he was the best criminal defense lawyer around. They weren't lying.

He was easy to get a hold of. Easy to talk to. And he was very straight forward and honest with me. He really batted for me. He was able to dismiss the 3rd DUI, clump up all the cases together, and now instead of going to jail, I have to do 120 days of house arrest. That is it! Jimmy really batted for me and kept me out of jail. I seriously thought I had no other choice but to go to jail based on my priors and probation terms that required jail terms if I violated them. Jimmy really worked hard for me, and after almost a year, the cases and probation violations have finally ended with no jail time.

He really cares about your case, and knows how to move around the court at the North Justice Center, as I've seen him speak to prosecutors and judges, as if he knew them personally. If you want an attorney that will really work hard for you, that is honest and straight forward, Jimmy Cha is the best criminal defense lawyer around.

Recently I was charged with a 2nd DUI offense with an injury to 2 chp officers. I was facing a felony with a possible 3 years sentence in state prison and racking up thousands in fines. After going to more than numerous court dates, Jimmy stayed persistent and assured me he was going to do the best he could. With that being said, he was able to reduce the felony to a misdemeanor, my fees dropped to $500, and substituted jail time for house arrest. But due to my own fault in an house arrest violation, I had to go to county which I was later released within 48 hours.

I am very happy to have chosen Jimmy to represent me, because even with the relentless DA on our case he was able to get a deal that was near impossible. I respect that he was thorough and very honest with me when giving advice. He treated me better than just a client and definitely took on my case with much care. Thanks again Jimmy for everything! You’re the man!

reviews.text: I retained Steven Patterson to handle my divorce in 2016 and was very displeased with his services.  He recommended I hire a consultant to to evaluate the income my X-wife could potentially earn since she had not worked for several years.  The report came in with an estimated income lower than the job she was eventually hired for. In addition, he ran up legal fees exceeding $44,000.00 and failed to negotiate a termination clause or stipulate a time frame in the court order for spouse support.   I have been paying almost 60k a year for spouse support and as I approach retirement age, I now have to retain another attorney to request support to be terminated or modified.  Its such a scam.

STAY AWAY from Patterson Law Firm (PLF). I received lackluster family law representation from Ryan E. Dryer and Steven R. Patterson. PLF was not only outmaneuvered by opposing counsel (I had a front row seat), they took advantage of a highly contentious divorce (greed, lies and false declarations/accusations on my ex-spouse's part, and matter of principle, the truth/credibility, witnesses and evidence on my part). PLF lined their own pockets by prolonging the matter [FOUR (4) YEARS without ever reaching trial]. I communicated to Mr. Dryer and Mr. Patterson (who supervises Ryan and oversaw my case) that I was unhappy with the services being rendered and requested to change family law attorneys within the firm, and Mr. Patterson IGNORED my request. While I was frustrated, I believed it would be counterproductive to drop PLF and retain new legal counsel since, after two plus years, they were familiar with my case and Mr. Dryer repeatedly assured me that he was "ready for trial" - false promises.

Trial was postponed over and over and OVER again - the PLF playbook goes like this: the lawyers meet privately in judge's chambers (FACT: when attorneys meet in judge’s chambers, there is no court reporter present and therefore, no record or Minute Order of their backroom deals) - the only recorded outcome at each hearing was the Court setting new hearing dates over and over again. Such delays prolonged the bleeding by extending temporary support orders as well as required new income and expense declarations to be filed (and there were many). This legal tactic creates ongoing cash flow for Patterson Law Firm - i.e., over-billing.

I got no fight from PLF, just politics. In four (4) years, I NEVER reached trial (the judge never heard my case) which benefited my ex-spouse since she was receiving high temporary support and free medical and dental to boot. We were married for six (6) years - I paid ALL household and medical expenses post separation without reimbursement PLUS temporary spousal and child support (over 70% of my net earnings) for over four (4) years - more than HALF the duration of our short-term marriage - which as I understand, is higher in the beginning and decreases over time (but not for me!).  A good family law attorney will create a support reduction or elimination strategy based on the case history and the judgment or marital settlement agreement - PLF FAILED to help me in this department.

Four (4) years later [down $175K+ in legal fees, paying excessive temporary spousal and child support as well as costs not covered by my medical insurance] and YET AGAIN, A NEW HEARING DATE SET BY THE COURT, I buckled and wound up settling in a LOPSIDED financial settlement that favored my ex-spouse. To add salt to the wound, Mr. Dryer conceded to certain stipulations in the financial settlement agreement without consulting me AND provided ill-advice in the end that cost me more money - thanks, PLF.

Mr. Dryer is nice, but nice does not cut it in divorce proceedings. I am now representing myself in court (In Pro Per) for certain post-divorce child custody matters and have fared better without Patterson Law Firm in my corner. The judge has actually heard my case and I have spoken to him on the record with positive results more times in three months than the previous previous four years with Patterson Law Firm - and that's a FACT.

If you need an attorney who will fight tirelessly to ensure your rights are protected as well as competently handle your financial (and child custody) divorce/family law matters, then DO NOT waste your time and money with Patterson Law Firm - cut your losses and drop them immediately or better yet, don't bother retaining PLF in the first place.

Thet worked on legal transfer of property paperwork for my family.  At the end of the transaction we owed more money than was quoted, due to extra work and filing or documenting fees etc. Work was done yes, but extra fees not appreciated.  Maybe that is just how the legal services run.

Nothing positive about any experience with Patterson Law Firm sadly. Bastiaan Vandenberg was a  Waste of thousands of dollars with little respect. I’m no longer a client of Patterson Law Scam. I couldn’t recommend this Law Firm to anyone. I’m currently looking for a Attorney with a back bone and ability in a civil court. There are no words for how much of a waste Patterson Law Firm is and was.
A professional  will recive and help you

He explained how businesses can avoid contract disputes by establishing solid legal frameworks early on, and emphasized the importance of understanding the difference between resolving a case through settlement versus going to trial. He also pointed out common mistakes that businesses make during litigation — like poor documentation or lack of preparedness — and offered practical advice on how to prevent them.

reviews.text:
Because the other party of my Chinese divorce judgment applied for assistance in enforcement in the United States, I hired Attorney Liu as my defense attorney under the recommendation of the Bar Association and my trust attorney. During the cooperation process, I felt that he sought legal basis for my interests and protected my interests, provided me with the best legal advice I thought, and listened to and respected the opinions of the parties. He is very professional in legal professional ability, and is familiar with the court process and judges' psychology in litigation experience. I am very satisfied with the effect of the response. Although the final result has not yet come out, I feel that he has escorted me during the process. His character, professionalism and experience are trustworthy, and I am very satisfied with the cooperation. Thank you very much for Attorney Liu's legal help. Comparing the two translations:

Apple’s Translation
•Strengths:
• Grammatically correct and understandable.
• Captures the main points in a straightforward manner.
• Weaknesses:
• Some phrases are overly literal and awkward in English, such as “to apply for assistance in execution” and “I am very familiar with it.”
• Repetitive use of “experience” and “familiar” makes the text less polished.
• Some nuances, such as “protect my interests” and “legal basis,” feel redundant or simplified.
• “We also listen to and respect the opinions of the parties” lacks clarity on who “we” refers to.

My Translation
•Strengths:
• Provides a more polished and natural English flow.
• Captures the nuances of appreciation for the lawyer’s professional skills, integrity, and respect for the client’s opinions.
• Avoids awkward repetition (e.g., “experience” and “familiar”).
•	Phrasing such as “meticulously basing his actions on legal grounds to safeguard my rights” adds precision and professionalism.
• Weaknesses:
• Slightly more formal and elaborative, which could feel less direct to some readers.

Conclusion:
• Accuracy: Both translations are accurate in conveying the key ideas, but mine reflects the nuances of the original Chinese text more precisely.
• Polish and Readability: My translation is smoother and more professional, which is crucial for legal or formal contexts.
• Recommendation: If the purpose is a professional or official letter of appreciation, my version would be the better choice. If simplicity is the priority, Apple’s translation works but may require minor editing for clarity.

reviews.text:
We used Jay Yu earlier this year to create a will and a trust for my husband and me. The work Jay did for our estate was excellent and we found him to be a first-class professional. Jay spent time with us, making efforts to answer all our questions. He even agreed as a courtesy to answer questions that might come up later about implementing his estate plan for us. Jay is a professor of estate law, and the unique thing about him is that not only was he devoted to serving our needs, he also wanted us to understand the work he did for us. Most attorneys focus only on the results, but Jay offers that rare quality of educating his clients as well. He is careful, detailed and conscientious. In the end, Jay presented us with a nice binder that had everything we needed including instructions on how to move our assets into our trust. His process is well organized, and he was clear about what to expect. We'd definitely use Jay Yu again for future estate planning work and have already recommended him to people we know.  We were grateful for his guidance in putting together estate documents that met our needs.

Just a quick update on our original post. We had a dog bite issue that arose, and Jay Yu was very gracious in investigating the initial issues to see if it made sense for us to pursue a claim. He devoted significant time and effort (and even some expense) to helping us, even though ultimately, we weren't able to go forward with a claim or hire his firm. Even so, that didn't affect the level of excellence and effort he put into helping us. This is the kind of integrity and selfless generosity that Jay and his firm consistently exhibit. Their consistency in keeping clients informed and supporting their interests are unparalleled. We cannot recommend Jay and his firm highly enough and would not hesitate to use them in a future matter.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you both again so very much. Your words are truly appreciated.

reviews.text: Strongly recommend Jay and his team for handling your estate planning needs! They handled our family’s estate planning with patience, courtesy, and professionalism, advising and answering all the questions we had as first-timers to this process. They took care of preparing all the documents, tailoring them to our specific needs, and in above and beyond work, provided written summaries and instructions for all documents so that they were more easily understood by all of us. All this combined has provided a much-needed peace of mind regarding our family’s future, and for that there is much gratitude to Jay and his team.

reviews.text:
Mr. Yu was  my professor for my Estate Planning class at California State University of Fullerton about 6 months ago. His class was one of the most, if not the most, challenging classes I had in my 4 years of college. He would teach us real life scenarios that were extremely complex and would emphasize certain keywords that I will never forget thanks to his great style of teaching. Moving forward to today, as I am currently studying for the CFP (Certified Financial Planner Exam), I realized how great of a professor he was, he was great at explaining the topics in such detail that I still remembered them today. He would also always stay after class till every single question a student may have was answered. Last but not least, he is highly responsive on any emails me or any classmate would send.

This brings me to the reason why I came to leave a review for him. Although I have not used his services for Estate Planning (I do plan to eventually), I believe this will help future clients of his know what type of person he is. Mr. Yu is someone genuine and caring who will go above and beyond to help others. Rest assure that if you use his services you will get an efficient and effective Estate Law Attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for being a fantastic student! Keep in touch, I truly appreciate your time and words.

reviews.text:
Ms. Shahnaz Hussain, took on my case of a fall backwards on a transit bus. I had minor, non permanent injury, but she was willing to take the case regardless. After two lengthy years, the Respondent settled. Ms. Hussain is a pleasant attorney to work with  and receptive to suggestions her client may have. She handled my case professionally and has the experience to be a fine trial lawyer even though we never went to trial. I highly  recommend her to represent your injury case.
Sincerely, Mr. E. Bizzell
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Bizzell,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience and for your kind words. It was a pleasure working with you on your case. I am glad to hear that you felt supported and that I was able to reach a satisfactory settlement. Your recommendation means a lot to me. If you ever need assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Shahnaz Hussain

reviews.text:
I reached out to Ashley Baron a few days ago for advice on a payment dispute I was having with my previous contractor. To my surprise, the man himself—Mr. Baron—answered the phone. When I asked if he was the owner, he responded with polite humor: "You got me."

Despite the stressful situation I was in and my search for legal advice, he made the conversation both relaxing and informative, walking me through possible outcomes with clarity. If you're looking for guidance in the construction field, he’s definitely worth checking out.
They are highly knowledgeable, attentive listeners, and provide professional and well-informed advice.
Incredible advice; very knowledgeable and helpful! Definitely recommend to homeowners who are being hurt by bad contractors! Thank you, Ashley!
Ashley is extremely knowledgable in her profession . She explained everything to me so that I fully understood and was so patient with my questions!

We are currently having an issue with our contractor.
Ashley quickly responded, provided education and guidance. Very much appreciated.

Ashley spent the time to really hear Me out and explain all the options I had. Ashley was nice enough to go over all the pros and cons of my situation and I  had a clearer vision of what I needed to do. I would highly recommend!
Ashley did a great job helping me with a partnership agreement that didn’t benefit my company. I highly recommend her, very knowledgeable and took the time to explain everything.

A great experience under unfortunate circumstances with our remodel. Ashley Baron was very helpful,  knowledgeable,  and extremely responsive to calls & emails. We will most definitely use her again if we find ourselves with construction issues. We're pleased with the outcome and happy we had her on our side!
I am very happy with the service I received. Baron Law Group is knowledgable and responsive.

Highly recommend Ashley Baron! She did a great job researching our case involving a fraudulent contractor we unfortunately had hired to fix our home after a flood. Our experience with Ms. Baron exceeded our expectations - She clearly cares about her clients and is reasonable and fair.

Ms. Ashley Baron was contacted regarding construction law issue with a contractor. Ms. Baron was very detailed, informative, knowledgable, and provided a solution to the issue at hand. Will refer to Ms. Baron on future construction and contracts law related issues.

Contractor fairy tile inc, completely damaged my project. I have to hire someone to finish. After when the tile will set realize the shower is leaking the faucets are not working I had no choice I have to go in hiring attorney.
I did not catch the name of the attorney who spoke with me almost an hour for free and he explained to me everything and detailed. I was looking for arbitration attorney, but i asked him  several  question regarding where to start and what to expect . Unfortunately from that point he cannot present me. He was very patient, professional and never even Ask to pay for a consultation. Almost an hour he answered on all my questions. It’s great attorney,  I would recommend highly recommend. Unfortunately, I did not catch his name his voice was very quiet and look like he had a cold. Thank you so much for your help.
Great feedback and very knowledgeable about construction law. Would call back for a consultation.

I reached out to Ashley to gather more information to better protect and prepare myself in regards to contract law. I was pleasantly surprised that Ashley spent the time with me on the phone to give me some pointers along with online reference. She was honest and advised that she can take a look at my contract to see how much work is involved and then we can regroup to see if I’d like to take on her services. I felt very comfortable and not at all rushed speaking with Ashley. If things were to go south, I wouldn’t hesitate to call up Ashley again for her assistance.

(Update 1) Fast forward a couple weeks, I set up a consultation with Ashley to discuss how things have developed and sought her advice on what options I had. Similar to my prior experience, Ashley was very patient and willing to help. Despite how things have progressed with my situation, I felt comforted by Ashley’s knowledge and experience with construction law. Based on our conversation, Ashley was able to help me strategize and even draft an offer to compromise. I was extremely impressed that I could count on Ashley’s professionalism and timeliness in response. Unfortunately and fortunately, my situation has not yet resolved so I am glad that I can be looking forward to working with Ashley again.

(Update 2) Fast forward another week, Ashley helped us draft a settlement agreement. Once again, super impressed with Ashley’s timeliness and professionalism. We understood that Ashley must have quite the workload so we were extremely grateful that she was willing to help and provide such quick turnaround. Having found Ashley has made this horrendous situation so much more bearable. We’re so happy we found her and know that we’ve established a connection should future issues arise.

Outstanding in her professionalism, depth of knowledge, ethical compass, and scope of practice, Mrs. Baron, Esq., led us successfully from start to finish through harrowing circumstances.  Her tenacity and clear-sightedness, mixed with her compassion and superior listening skills, were most welcomed.  An excellent job!

I reached out to an attorney whose law articles I had read in the past, specifically Ashley Baron of the Baron Group with a  clarification question re: the responsibility of the RMO and/or the licensee for negligence and she went above and beyond to help.  These are the type of attorneys and firms that understand the person's questions and responds to them in a very thorough way - the kind we do not have the pleasure of dealing with today as there are so few of them.  Thank you so much Baron Law Group

I had a very good experience with Ashley.  She was very professional, intelligent, and answered all my questions.  She is an expert in construction law and provided me with different possible solutions to my problems.  I plan on engaging her for legal services and will provide an update later on.  I found her based on Yelp reviews and Google reviews and I am glad I did.

I don't typically post reviews but had to for this group. Ashley not only helped but went above and beyond, on a Saturday at first point of contact! She stayed on the phone with me to explain the issues and also followed up with a very lengthy email, when she really didn't have to. Wow, this lady is special. My opinion is to call her, she's knowledgeable and very easy to talk to. - Omar
Very professional,knowledgeable, and very kind.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Mr. Urena!

reviews.text: Sierra Framing, Inc. is a specialty contractor located in Santa Ana, we specialize in rough carpentry scope of single-family residential track homes and multi-family developments of 200+ units. We have known and utilized Ashley through the Baron Law Group since 2017. We regularly use the Baron Law Group to provide feedback, comments and redlines of ALL our construction contracts prior to execution with our clients. Moreover, Ashley has helped us over the years on a as needed basis to file mechanic liens, perfect liens, and file suit as necessary, as well as representing us through mediation and/or arbitration. We have worked with many attorneys over the years ranging from big firms to individual practices, Ashley is our go to attorney for construction matters for her professionalism, knowledge of the law/matter at hand, and her availability to help us in such an efficient and speedy manner, always keeping us informed without having to call her looking for status updates (as we often see with other firms). Ashley and the Baron Law Group is one of the best attorneys we have had the chance to work with over the years and is our go to for all construction matters as well as miscellaneous general counsel. We are pleased to have Ashley as our construction attorney and would highly recommend her to anyone seeking an attorney for construction matters.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Joshua, I am happy to help out!  Look forward to continuing to work with you!

reviews.text:
I own a mid-sized construction firm in Bellflower and had to file a mechanics lien on a commercial project in riverside County. I hired the Baron Law Group, dealing directly with Ashley Baron.  She explained the processes thoroughly and got right on filing the lawsuit to perfect the mechanics lien. I was extremely happy with her services and the costs .Baron Law Group has become my go to lawyer. I have dealt with other lawyers in the past and was disappointed in the communication and trying to reach them to find out what was going on., not so with Baron Law Group. Ms. Baron kept me informed without my having to ask. Baron Law Group also got me the results I was after, getting the case resolved quickly and cost effectively.  I highly recommend Baron l
Law Group,

reviews.text:
I would highly and unequivocally recommend Ashley Baron.

She is professional, knowledgeable, and compassionate about representing her clients as well as achieving the best outcome possible. She explains the law effortlessly and is prompt in her updates on the case.

We hired Baron Law Group in hopes to attained restitution for home remodeling works that we felt were performed improperly, below industry standards, and exhibited negligence. Ms. Baron was able to navigate through all the ambiguities of a poorly written contract agreement, limited documentation of work performed, and apply relevant law. She exhibits mastery in her field and is persuasive in her communications. Having her represent us ultimately allowed my family to restructure and continue with our lives. Considering that we were likely a small clientele, we are grateful for her representation and the dedication that she had provided. She was able to accomplish all this in the midst of a pandemic!

If you are seeking for an attorney, especially one that specializes in building construction, Ms. Baron is the person you want and can trust.

Ashley, the Ly family thanks you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Ly, I am glad we received the result you were hoping for and we were able to resolve your construction defect issues.  Hopefully your lovely home is finally coming together.  Thank you for your kind comments.
